description: Shortcut is a project management and issue tracking platform for software teams, with features for stories, epics, iterations, docs, roadmaps, and objectives. It lets teams organize and automate development work across a shared workspace.
summary: Shortcut exposes a REST API (v3 docs with machine-readable Swagger/OpenAPI links advertised but not directly resolved here) and a hosted MCP server; both require authentication, using either a workspace API token for REST or Shortcut account OAuth for MCP.
